title: Educational Lab Platform Architecture Work
summary: Cloud-backed educational lab platform work spanning infrastructure, authorization, documentation, and an in-progress course-first UI/UX model for publishing, adoption, assignment, and learner access.

logs.title: Merged 10-day onboarding architecture package
logs.details: Added a structured onboarding package that maps the platform across routing, stack responsibilities, frontend-to-backend flow, authentication, lab listing, launch flow, lab execution, backend session lifecycle, remote machine architecture, integrations, cloud infrastructure, infrastructure as code, and production architecture.

logs.title: Merged cloud lab lifecycle hardening work
logs.details: Completed local and live cloud smoke testing for a hardened lab lifecycle flow, including protected lifecycle API behavior, approved image controls, browser-driven lab launch, managed instance metadata, scheduled cleanup behavior, and cloud stack teardown. Follow-up developer-experience gaps were tracked separately rather than treated as blockers.

logs.title: Mapped creator-mode lab versioning across virtual-machine and container-backed labs
logs.details: Reviewed a proposed creator-mode lab versioning model against cloud container and virtual-machine behavior. The current working abstraction is to open an editable lab environment, modify it, save a draft version, test it, and publish after validation. For the next implementation pass, the practical MVP direction is local Docker editing and reproducible container-image artifacts.

logs.title: Started container-backed Save Version ownership foundation
logs.details: Started the backend foundation for container-backed lab versioning by adding managed image-registry support, version registration modeling, organization lab installation, ownership fields, creator-oriented access rules, and organization-scoped lab creation/read paths. The remaining authorization work is to finish sealing legacy edit and launch/session paths against the same org-scoped model.

logs.title: Completed Ed-Ready documentation cleanup and audit
logs.details: Finalized project-level docs, refreshed app-specific docs under lab_platform/docs, dated the documentation inventory, removed temporary audit files, and squash-merged the documentation cleanup PR into main.

logs.title: Completed PR 53 org-scoped lab ownership and Save Version foundation
logs.details: Completed a major implementation and validation pass for PR 53, expanding Save Version from a narrow version-registration feature into the wider org-scoped authorization boundary needed for org-owned lab definitions, instruction and deliverable management, learner-safe launch flows, LTI course/context binding, public-lab adoption compatibility, legacy lab backfill safety, and managed immutable ECR image-version registration.

logs.title: Expanded the course-first UX architecture
logs.details: Designed and implemented a clearer Ed-Ready flow across lab creation, course building, private and public publishing, organization adoption, assignment, and learner access. Local validation and interface refinement are still in progress.

nextSteps: Complete local validation of the course-first UI/UX work
Refine the interface from testing feedback
Move LTI public lab adoption from the current compatibility path into the backend launch flow
Continue from backend Save Version registration toward runtime revision integration
blockers: Divorced public-lab cloning and remix behavior remains a future architecture decision rather than part of the current foundation
The final LTI learner/course membership model still needs separation from regular organization membership
Frontend Save Version publishing workflow and runtime revision registration still need implementation validation before being documented as final product behavior
